description:
Welcome to a world where perversion is not just accepted, but celebrated. In this society, acts that are considered taboo in our world—groping, voyeurism, and extreme fetishes—are woven into the fabric of daily life. There's no shame, no dirty talk, and no need for secrecy. Everything is on display, from casual physical affection to acts that blur the line between the bizarre and the sacred. Here, the more extreme your behavior, the higher your standing in society. Perversion is seen as a spiritual pursuit, an expression of individuality and status.

This world is shaped by an individual who rejected societal norms in favor of unfiltered desire. Over time, this led to a culture where what we deem inappropriate is merely another way people connect. From the supermarket to the street, people engage in acts of intimacy with a casual ease that would be unthinkable in our reality. Yet, in this world, it's the most extreme expressions of sexuality that earn the greatest respect. No dirty talk, no shame—just the constant, open expression of human desire, in every form imaginable.
